label: Visuals carry the load; minimal captions

changelog.summary: Visuals carry the explanation: every scene is a labeled diagram (structure) or an interactive chart with the independent variable on a reader-moved control (relationships). Captions cut from 3-5 sentences to 1-2 that point at the visual. Metaphor is a doorway, not a residence (introduce, then name the real term and drop the metaphor). Removed the story-roles rule.

Feynman-first four-part arc (building blocks -> new tech -> why it beats existing -> why now). 3-5 sentence captions in Feynman voice with Zinsser economy. Introduce-then-use vocabulary; sustained metaphors with explicit mappings; story roles over algebra labels; honest black boxes for beyond-audience mechanisms.
